description.p: Aether is an experimental modal text editor with a client–server architecture and tree-sitter integration. A long-lived local server holds all text state — buffer contents, cursors, selections, the undo stack — while thin clients render what the server sends and forward keystrokes. Multiple clients can share a buffer, see each other's cursors, and share a single undo stack.

ul.li: Modal editing with tree-sitter highlighting, indentation, and navigation
Fuzzy pickers for files, buffers, and workspaces; file explorer; workspace-wide grep
Git integration: gutter, inline diff, blame, hunk staging
LSP support: diagnostics, hover, go-to-definition, formatting
